steps.t: Êkh-buri-Dhûr and Gnô-maka-Ghûr are in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with Êkh-buri-Dhûr and Gnô-maka-Ghûr before the wedding ceremony begins.
The sacred wedding pebbles can be found in Drû Bhûta. Êkh-buri-Dhûr asks you to hold the sacred wedding pebbles.
The wedding goat can be found in Drû Bhûta. Êkh-buri-Dhûr asks you to tickle the sacred wedding goat.
Êkh-buri-Dhûr and Gnô-maka-Ghûr are in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with the newly wed couple.
Ôk-weni-Dhûr is in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with Ôk-weni-Dhûr.
